name_cn:
‚≠źÔłŹClose to Original‚≠źÔłŹPerfect Details‚≠źÔłŹOriginal Hardware„ÄźDIANE Handbag„ÄĎ M46317 French Toast Winter Wool Collection
This Diane handbag combines soft-colored wool leather with classic Monogram canvas, joining the 2022 Winter Cozygram capsule collection with a fresh look. Distressed cowhide trim adorns the bag, paired with dazzling metal hardware to release charming allure. Removable top handle and leather long shoulder strap offer multiple carrying options.
Size: 24 x 15 x 9 cm
